chest.name: Barbell Bench Press (Flat)
chest.desc: Squeeze the chest at the top and maintain a slight back arch.

chest.name: Dumbbell Bench Press (Flat)
chest.desc: Allows for an extended range of motion.

chest.name: Barbell Bench Press (Incline)
chest.desc: Targets upper chest. Keep your feet planted.

chest.name: Decline Bench Press
chest.desc: Keep elbows tucked in at a 45-degree angle.

chest.name: Pec Deck Machine
chest.desc: Isolate the chest fibers without engaging triceps.

chest.name: Push-ups
chest.desc: Keep your core tight and elbows tucked.

lowImpact.name: Wall Push-ups
lowImpact.desc: Stand and push from the wall.

noEquipment.name: Knee Push-ups
noEquipment.desc: Drop to knees to reduce load.

back.name: Barbell Rows
back.desc: Hinge at the hips, pull the bar to your belly button.

back.name: Dumbbell Rows
back.desc: Keep that back straight and pull to your hips!

back.name: T-Bar Rows
back.desc: Use a V-grip handle, squeeze lats at the top.

back.name: Pull-ups
back.desc: Focus on pulling with your lats, not your arms.

back.name: Lat Pulldown (Wide Grip)
back.desc: Bring the bar to your upper chest.

back.name: Lat Pulldown (Close Grip)
back.desc: Lean back slightly and pull to your lower chest.

shoulders.name: Overhead Press (Barbell)
shoulders.desc: Core tight, press without leaning too far back.

shoulders.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press (Seated)
shoulders.desc: Control the weight on the way down.

shoulders.name: Machine Shoulder Press
shoulders.desc: Strict movement plane for safely adding volume.

shoulders.name: Lateral Raises (Dumbbell)
shoulders.desc: Pour the pitchers of water at the top.

shoulders.name: Front Raises
shoulders.desc: Raise to eye level, do not swing.

shoulders.name: Face Pulls
shoulders.desc: Great for shoulder health. Pull towards your nose.

legs.name: Barbell Squats
legs.desc: Chest up, sink deep, drive out of the hole.

legs.name: Hack Squat
legs.desc: Focus on quad drive, press through mid-foot.

legs.name: Walking Lunges
legs.desc: Keep your balance and stay low.

legs.name: Leg Extensions
legs.desc: Pause at the top for maximum tension on quads.

legs.name: Romanian Deadlifts (Barbell)
legs.desc: Hinge at the hips. Hamstrings loaded.

legs.name: Romanian Deadlifts (Dumbbell)
legs.desc: Keep dumbbells close to your legs.

legs.name: Hip Thrusts (Barbell)
legs.desc: The king of glutes. Pause at the top.

legs.name: Calf Raises (Seated)
legs.desc: Puts focus on the soleus muscle.

arms.name: Barbell Curls
arms.desc: No swinging! Pin elbows to ribs.

arms.name: Tricep Pushdowns (Rope)
arms.desc: Pull the rope apart at the bottom.

arms.name: Overhead Tricep Extension (Dumbbell)
arms.desc: Keep elbows close to your head.

core.name: Plank
core.desc: Squeeze your glutes and brace your core.

core.name: Cable Crunches
core.desc: Flex spine, pull down with abs.

full-body.name: Kettlebell Swings
full-body.desc: It's a hip hinge, not a squat.

full-body.name: Thrusters
full-body.desc: Seamless movement from squat to press.

mobility.name: World's Greatest Stretch
mobility.desc: A flowing mobility sequence for full body.

mobility.name: 90/90 Hip Switches
mobility.desc: Open hips and improve squat comfort.

cardio.name: Stairmaster
cardio.desc: Pace yourself, no handrails if possible.
